name: Eden
tagline: Call multiple AI providers through one compatible API
description: Generate chat completions and discover available models through Eden AI's V3 unified API. Requires an Eden AI bearer token and a model identifier supported by the account.

auth.hint: Create an Eden AI API token and send it as Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>. Store only the token value in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List model identifiers available through Eden AI V3 for use in later inference requests.

tools.name: create_chat_completion
tools.description: Send a message history to an Eden AI model and return an OpenAI-compatible chat completion with choices and usage data.

params.name: model
params.description: Eden AI model identifier returned by the models endpoint.

params.name: messages
params.description: Conversation messages in chronological order, each containing a supported role and content.

params.name: stream
params.description: Request a streamed response when true; use false for ordinary JSON tool execution.

params.name: temperature
params.description: Sampling temperature from 0 through 2; the documented default is 1.

params.name: max_tokens
params.description: Maximum tokens to generate, subject to the selected model's limits.

params.name: fallbacks
params.description: Up to three fallback model identifiers to try if the primary model is unavailable.
